variants.text: Cheers! To finishing the semester. Slow down, man—you're hitting that cup hard. Watch the BAC, yeah? Don't want another New Year's incident.

options.text: Is the... floor... supposed to be blue?

variants.text: zzz... bro... is that a unicorn... lemme just close my eyes for a sec...
Bro, you shhtill here? The bartendr... go t' him. Tell 'im I shent ya. *hic*
Hey, tick-tock, man. The clock is eating you alive. Bartender. NOW. Go!
Go talk to the Bartender, move it!

phoneTrigger.text:
[PHONE NOTIFICATION: DUE IN 55 MINUTES. STATUS: NOT SUBMITTED]

Anyway, did you actually submit that final CSSE project? The big one?

panic.text: Nah, man. 12:00 AM tonight. Look at your phone. Your laptop is still on the kitchen table... you need to get out of here. Talk to the Bartender—he knows who has the floor keys.
